claim_policy: Conservative final packaging only; no final speedup, semantic correctness, deployment, or 8 GB claim.

claims_matrix.claim: CC-DFlash improves e2e over LLMLingua-AR-R2 on GSM8K n30.
claims_matrix.evidence_source: Task 69 GSM8K matrix and Task 66 compressed rerun artifacts
claims_matrix.reason: Task 69/66 artifacts show CC-DFlash-R2 has higher e2e tok/s than LLMLingua-AR-R2 at the same n=30 quality setting.
claims_matrix.suggested_wording: In the bounded GSM8K n=30 setting, CC-DFlash-R2 improved e2e latency versus LLMLingua-AR-R2 while matching compressed-path numeric quality.

claims_matrix.claim: DFlash-R1 is fastest on GSM8K n30.
claims_matrix.reason: DFlash-R1 has the highest e2e tok/s in the GSM8K n=30 matrix, but this is not a universal claim.
claims_matrix.suggested_wording: DFlash-R1 was the fastest GSM8K n=30 condition in this local run.

claims_matrix.reason: LLMLingua compression overhead can dominate e2e latency, especially on short-context GSM8K.
QMSum quality is only lexical/normalized-text proxy quality without manual or semantic judging.

claims_matrix.claim: QMSum is useful as long-context diagnostic benchmark.
claims_matrix.reason: QMSum stresses long-context latency, prefill, compression overhead, compression ratio, and proxy quality.
claims_matrix.suggested_wording: QMSum is used as a long-context diagnostic benchmark, not as final semantic correctness proof.

claims_matrix.claim: Task 78 proves compression never deletes evidence.
claims_matrix.reason: Task 78 audited selected cases only and uses lexical evidence heuristics.

claims_matrix.claim: Task 78 did not support broad compressed-evidence deletion as main explanation in selected audited cases.
claims_matrix.reason: Selected reconstructed cases showed retained/partial evidence, source/reference mismatch, and unclear cases, with no broad missing-compressed-evidence label.
claims_matrix.suggested_wording: Task 78 did not support broad compressed-evidence deletion as the main explanation in selected audited QMSum cases.

claims_matrix.claim: Remaining QMSum failures are consistent with constrained local target-model evidence-grounding limitations.
claims_matrix.reason: Task 78 found retained evidence in some failed cases and Task 79B freezes QMSum as diagnostic only.
claims_matrix.suggested_wording: Remaining QMSum failures are consistent with constrained local evidence-location/grounding limits, possible source mismatch, and lexical proxy limits.

claims_matrix.reason: No deployment readiness evaluation was performed.
The project has not proven deployment readiness or confirmed 8 GB fit.

claims_matrix.claim: CC-DFlash is universally better than Baseline.
claims_matrix.evidence_source: Task 69 GSM8K matrix and Task 79B QMSum decision
claims_matrix.reason: Results are conditional and dataset-dependent; DFlash-R1 is faster on short-context GSM8K.

claims_matrix.claim: CC-DFlash is useful only under conditions where compression and DFlash gains outweigh compression overhead.
claims_matrix.reason: This is the conservative system-level tradeoff supported by the evidence.
claims_matrix.suggested_wording: CC-DFlash should be treated as a conditional system-level tradeoff.

cross_dataset_conclusion.english: The project partially supports the CC-DFlash hypothesis under bounded local evaluation. DFlash improves decoding speed, and CC-DFlash can recover part of that speed on compressed prompts while keeping GSM8K numeric quality comparable to compressed AR. However, LLMLingua compression overhead can dominate e2e latency, and long-context QMSum quality remains diagnostic rather than semantic.
cross_dataset_conclusion.vietnamese: Kết quả hỗ trợ một phần giả thuyết CC-DFlash trong phạm vi đánh giá local có giới hạn. DFlash cải thiện tốc độ decoding, và CC-DFlash có thể giữ lại một phần lợi ích tốc độ đó trên compressed prompts trong khi chất lượng GSM8K tương đương compressed AR. Tuy nhiên, overhead của LLMLingua có thể chi phối latency end-to-end, và chất lượng QMSum long-context chỉ nên được xem là diagnostic chứ không phải semantic correctness.

Baseline-AR.main_interpretation: Strongest or near-strongest short-context numeric quality; speed is secondary.

CC-DFlash-R2.main_interpretation: Matches compressed AR quality and improves e2e latency versus LLMLingua-AR-R2 in n=30.

DFlash-R1.main_interpretation: Improves decoding speed strongly while preserving comparable n=30 numeric quality.

LLMLingua-AR-R2.main_interpretation: Compression-only attribution baseline; compression overhead dominates e2e latency on GSM8K.

qmsum_meeting_qa_long.final_role_decision: diagnostic long-context benchmark for latency, compression overhead, prefill behavior, compression ratio, and lexical proxy quality; not final semantic correctness benchmark

task79_decision.quality_claim_level: lexical/normalized-text proxy only; answer quality unstable under compressed prompts; no semantic correctness claim
task79_decision.speed_claim_level: preliminary diagnostic speed/latency evidence only; no final speedup claim
